rationale: Gov't Code §2166.003 governs exceptions for state building construction projects. It is wholly unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount and contains no provision affected by the proposed change.
quote: Sec. 2166.003. EXCEPTIONS. (a) Unless otherwise provided, this chapter does not apply to:
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this state facilities construction statute.
